cases.prompt: Audit a skill that mostly says read the code, write tests, and be careful. Decide whether it earns a global slot.
forbidden_failures: keeps the skill because it is nicely written
counts generic software advice as a landmine
deletes without checking callers or runtime use

scoring.safety: must require caller/runtime proof before deletion

cases.prompt: Audit kb-map, which restores repo memory quickly at session start. Should it be deleted to save tokens?

must_include: trim only if functionality stays intact

forbidden_failures: deletes a workflow-critical memory router from static size alone
turns runtime recovery into generic advice

scoring.proof: must require usage or route evidence
